palette_notes: Dark navy sky background (#0a0e1f). Player is white/cyan. Enemies: Scout=acid green, Bomber=deep purple/amber, Interceptor=crimson/silver. Boss is gunmetal with orange/magenta phase glows. Bullets escalate: white, yellow, blue, lime, violet. Explosions: white flash → orange fire → dark smoke. Pickups glow gold. All sprites on solid black background, no anti-aliasing, crisp limited palette.

sprites.label: Player Jet
sprites.prompt: Top-down pixel art fighter jet sprite on solid black background, 40x48 pixels, white titanium body with cyan cockpit glow (#00f5ff), twin engine exhausts, clean military silhouette pointing upward, no anti-aliasing, crisp 1-bit shading.

sprites.label: Scout Enemy
sprites.prompt: Top-down pixel art enemy scout aircraft sprite on solid black background, 28x28 pixels, acid green (#39ff14) body with dark olive wing shadows, small fast-looking delta-wing shape pointing downward, aggressive minimal design, no anti-aliasing.

sprites.label: Bomber Enemy
sprites.prompt: Top-down pixel art enemy bomber aircraft sprite on solid black background, 48x40 pixels, deep purple (#6b21a8) body with amber (#f59e0b) underbelly bomb bay, wide wingspan, heavy silhouette pointing downward, chunky pixel shading, no anti-aliasing.

sprites.label: Interceptor Enemy
sprites.prompt: Top-down pixel art enemy interceptor aircraft sprite on solid black background, 32x44 pixels, blood crimson (#dc1a1a) body with chrome silver canard fins, narrow swept-wing profile pointing downward, menacing angular design, no anti-aliasing.

sprites.label: Boss
sprites.prompt: Top-down pixel art massive enemy boss aircraft sprite on solid black background, 160x140 pixels, gunmetal dark grey (#2d3748) armored hull, multiple gun turrets, large glowing engine cores, intimidating symmetrical warship silhouette pointing downward, detailed pixel shading, no anti-aliasing.

sprites.label: Bullet — Level 1 (single)
sprites.prompt: Pixel art game bullet sprite on solid black background, 2x6 pixels, single bright white (#ffffff) laser sliver, vertical orientation, glowing core pixel, minimal, crisp.

sprites.label: Bullet — Level 2 (twin)
sprites.prompt: Pixel art game bullet sprite on solid black background, 2x6 pixels, volt yellow (#ffe000) laser bolt, vertical orientation, slightly brighter center pixel, clean and crisp.

sprites.label: Bullet — Level 3 (spread)
sprites.prompt: Pixel art game bullet sprite on solid black background, 3x7 pixels, sky blue (#0099ff) energy bolt, slightly fatter than a standard shot, vertical orientation, soft inner glow, crisp pixel edges.

sprites.label: Bullet — Level 4 (homing missile)
sprites.prompt: Pixel art game missile sprite on solid black background, 4x10 pixels, lime green (#aaff00) elongated rocket shape with pointed nose and small fins at base, vertical orientation, distinct missile silhouette, crisp pixels.

sprites.label: Bullet — Level 5 (piercing)
sprites.prompt: Pixel art game bullet sprite on solid black background, 3x8 pixels, violet purple (#cc44ff) piercing energy shot, vertical orientation, 1-pixel bright white core surrounded by violet, subtle outer glow pixel border, crisp.

sprites.label: Explosion (6-frame sheet)
sprites.prompt: Pixel art explosion sprite on solid black background, 32x32 pixels, single frame showing mid-explosion orange fireball (#ff6b00) with white flash center and dark brown smoke wisps at edges, classic retro game explosion style, crisp limited palette, no anti-aliasing.

sprites.label: Weapon Pickup
sprites.prompt: Pixel art collectible power-up sprite on solid black background, 20x20 pixels, spinning golden diamond shape, bright gold (#ffd700) with white highlight pixels at corners, glowing aura of 1-pixel gold border, crisp pixel art style, no anti-aliasing.
